name: Hank's Haute Dogs
tagline: Gourmet hot dogs in Kakaako — the lobster dog and Chicago dog are a step above any street cart.
mustOrder: Lobster dog — chunks of lobster on a buttery roll with lemon aioli
Chicago dog — proper Vienna beef, neon relish, sport peppers, the whole deal
Bacon-wrapped dog — crispy bacon-wrapped hot dog with jalapeños
parking: Street metered parking on Coral St. SALT at Our Kakaako garage nearby.
talkStory: Chef Hank Adaniya is a classically trained chef who ran the acclaimed Trio restaurant in Chicago (where Grant Achatz got his start) before moving to Honolulu and opening this gourmet hot dog shop in Kakaako around 2011. The Chicago dog uses authentic Vienna beef with neon relish and sport peppers — the real deal from a guy who grew up on them. The lobster dog with lemon aioli is legit one of the best lunch deals in Kakaako. A pioneer of Honolulu's elevated street food scene.
